what: Neural pipeline scored on verse-fold-v2 (tragedy-only: Euripides Bacchae 1-169): a leakage-clean tragedy dependency evaluation (gold from the UNESP Trees project, CC BY-SA 4.0).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); CPU sequential (canonical); gold tokenization; official CoNLL-2018 evaluator; one-shot after the 0.44.0 fold rebuilds (leaf-APOS cc->appos converter correction + per-fold gold repairs); greek.evaluate_on_verse(track='tragedy'); fold verse-fold-v2 (sha 22c860f8...), built from perseids-publications/unesp-trees @ a6367b97; vs v1: the 3-sentence sliver mislabeled hexameter removed (the Maximus prose paraphrase), 15 leaf-apposition DEPREL cells corrected cc->appos, 11 malformed gold lemmas repaired; leakage 0/36, work-level disjointness asserted

tragedy_bootstrap_ci_95.note: percentile bootstrap over the fold's sentences (the v2 fold is tragedy-only), 999 resamples, seed 0

vs_v1: UPOS/XPOS/UFeats/UAS byte-identical to the v1 measurement (no gold cells of those kinds changed); lemma 87.35->87.89 (the 11 lemma repairs), LAS 73.06->73.33 (the 15 appos corrections)
gold_diligence: the 0.42.0 eight-sentence scholarly spot-check plus the 0.44.0 specialist panel pass; the panel found the prose-paraphrase mislabel, the converter apposition defect, and the malformed lemmas the spot-check missed - all corrected in the v2 build, which now validates every emitted lemma is a clean Greek headword
